text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Oh my gosh, oh my gosh! Did you guys see yesterday's Running Love episode? That last scene was so good!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
"I love you from the top of your ears to the tip of
your tail..." My heart! When's someone gonna say
that to me?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Laurel
text_block_list.text:
Heh. You know, if someone actually said that to
me, I think I'd get a bit flustered.

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
Love... how marvelous! ☆ Love is absolutely
MARVELOUS! ★☆

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Sooo, what kinda person would you two want to
be swept off your feet by?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
As for me, I'd want it to be someone who'd love
me forever and ever!

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
I'd want them to be MAAARVELOUS! ☆★
Someone super-duper marvelous who I could
spread marvels with! ☆★☆

text_block_list.name: Sakura Laurel
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, those both sound wonderful! Anyone would
be lucky to be together with either of you.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Laurel
text_block_list.text:
Personally... I guess I'd like someone willing to
love the things I love, like my father's special
omelet recipe, or cherry blossom season.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Well Laurel, whoever gets to be with you is in for a heart-throbbing time. They'd be the luckiest person in the world!
